case_title: ELWYN CORTES VS. HIDEO INOMATA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-16-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTES, ELWYN AS TO DEFENDANT INOMATA, HIDEO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-04-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-12-2019

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 998 OFFER AND ACCEPTANCE ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORTES, ELWYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INOMATA, HIDEO $110,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $110,000.00, WITH INTEREST THEREON AT THE RATE OF TEN PERCENT (10%) PER ANNUM WITH SUCH INTEREST ONLY STARTING TO RUN ON 1/29/20 IF SUCH FUNDS HAVE NOT BEEN PAID BEFORE THAT TIME.SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
